mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (title, description, price, category_id, user_id, image, status, view_count) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{image}, #{status}, #{viewCount})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.username, c.name AS categoryName FROM product p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, u.username, c.name AS categoryName FROM product p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id
p.status = 0
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, u.username, c.name AS categoryName FROM product p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, u.username, c.name AS categoryName FROM product p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 0 ORDER BY p.view_count DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, category_id = #{categoryId}, image = #{image} WHERE id = #{id}
